name: Torture Chambers
effect: Increase production of Royal Castles / Evil Fortresses / Iron Strongholds (by alignment) based on assistants owned.
formula: (6 * ln(1 + x) ^ 3)%, where x is assistants owned

name: Devil Tyrant
effect: The three highest building tiers count more based on time spent as Evil this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.2 * x ^ 0.4)%, where x is Evil time this Reincarnation

name: Evil Conquerors
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Hell Portals built this Reincarnation.
formula: (4 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is highest Hell Portals this Reincarnation

name: Lava Pits
effect: Increase base production of Evil Fortresses by +200,000 and Hell Portals by +2,000,000. Playtime this Era counts more by 6 extra hours.

name: Demon Overseers
effect: Increase production of three highest building tiers based on Trophies unlocked.
formula: (2 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is trophies unlocked

name: Demonic Presence
effect: Increase Maximum Mana additively based on Evil spells cast this Era.
formula: +(6 * x ^ 0.4), where x is Evil spells cast this Era

name: Infernal Magic
effect: Hell Portals also increase Mana Regeneration.
formula: +(3.5 * x ^ 0.35), where x is Hell Portals owned

name: Burning Legion
effect: Gain assistants based on Hell Portals owned.
formula: +(1.5 * x ^ 0.65), where x is Hell Portals owned

name: Very Bad Guys
effect: Increase production of Heaven's Gate / Hell Portals / Ancient Pyramid (by alignment) based on highest Hell Portals this Reincarnation.
formula: (4 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is highest Hell Portals this Reincarnation

name: Abyssal Furnace
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Burning Abysses this Reincarnation. Higher tiers get better bonuses.
formula: (0.5 * T ^ 1.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where T is tier, x is highest Burning Abysses this Reincarnation

name: Demonic Fury
effect: Multiplicatively increase FC find chance based on minimum of Evil and Chaos time this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.25 * min(x, y) ^ 0.75)%, where x is Evil time, y is Chaos time this Reincarnation

name: Devastation
effect: Increase production of three highest building tiers based on Mana Regeneration.
formula: (2.5 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2.5)%, where x is Mana Regeneration
